name.label: Tool name
name.description: Sets the tool name the model calls (becomes mcp__flow__<name>).

agent.label: Agent
agent.description: Binds this tool to the agent configuration it extends.

description.label: Description
description.description: Describes what the tool does so Claude knows when to call it.

params.label: Parameters
params.description: Defines the tool's inputs, one row per parameter.

timeoutSeconds.label: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.description: Sets how many seconds to wait for a claude tool return before returning a timeout error to the model.

preApproved.label: Pre-approved
preApproved.description: Pre-approves the tool so the call skips the permission pipeline.

readOnly.label: Read-only
readOnly.description: Marks the tool side-effect-free so Claude may batch it in parallel with other reads.

errorPort.label: Error port
errorPort.description: Adds a separate error output; when the node throws, the error is sent there instead of halting the flow.

completePort.label: Complete port
completePort.description: Adds a complete output port that emits after the node finishes handling a message.

statusPort.label: Status port
statusPort.description: Adds a status output port that emits the node's status changes as messages.

call.label: Call
call.description: Fires when Claude calls this tool — carries the tool arguments under payload. Wire the flow's answer back to a claude tool return node.
